fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 70 should be `if clamp:` instead of `if not clamp:`. This causes clamping to be applied when it should not be, and vice-versa.

spec.expr: (not clamp and y__3 == y__1) or (clamp and y__3 >= (y0 if y0 <= y1 else y1) and y__3 <= (y0 if y0 >= y1 else y1))

constraints.intent: Checks that the computed latency y is clamped if and only if the clamp flag is set.

spec.expr: y__1 >= (y0 if y0 <= y1 else y1) and y__1 <= (y0 if y0 >= y1 else y1)

constraints.intent: When clamping is (wrongly) skipped for clamp=True cases, this checks if the extrapolated value is out of bounds.
When clamping is (wrongly) applied for clamp=False cases, this checks if the value was altered.
